title: The Forthcoming Time
overview: Students train at the Liebe Delta station; tensions and relationships are introduced before disaster strikes.

title: Unnecessary Things
overview: A sabotage incident begins to destabilize the station, causing confusion and mistrust.

title: Beyond the Vast Sea
overview: The crisis escalates as the station is dragged toward the dangerous “Sea of Geduld.”

title: The Ring of Ryvius
overview: The station is destroyed; surviving students escape aboard the hidden spaceship Ryvius, now stranded without adults.

title: A Little Harmony
overview: Students begin forming a fragile society aboard the Ryvius.

title: My Moment
overview: A coup led by Blue takes control; the Vital Guarder weapon system is discovered.

title: The Changing Times
overview: Power struggles deepen as leadership fractures and factions form.

title: We Didn't Know Anything
overview: The crew struggles to understand the ship and their situation.

title: Vital Guarder
overview: The giant weapon is activated as external threats emerge.

title: Even If You Can't Believe
overview: The Ryvius is attacked; it fights back but becomes a target of authorities and is forced to flee.

title: When the Party's Over
overview: After a brief celebration, the crew are labeled terrorists; rationing and inequality begin.

title: Whereabouts of the Future
overview: The crew debates their direction and survival strategy.

title: If Only to Meet
overview: Personal relationships intensify amid isolation.

title: To Be Too Conscious
overview: Class divisions and resentment worsen onboard.

title: Swept Away
overview: The Ryvius drifts further from help; morale declines.

title: Deforming World
overview: The ship’s internal society becomes increasingly unstable.

title: Free Order
overview: Authority structures begin to collapse.

title: Incomprehensible
overview: The survivors reflect on their failures and misunderstandings.

title: Smiling With You
overview: Moments of humanity appear amid growing chaos.

title: Things You Can't Give Up
overview: Ikumi seizes control of the ship using the Vital Guarder, enforcing strict rule.

title: We Don't Need Tomorrow
overview: The crew becomes divided under harsh leadership.

title: In Order to Survive
overview: Martial law intensifies as survival becomes the only priority.

title: Torn Past
overview: Characters confront their past actions and guilt.

title: Kouji Aiba
overview: Kouji challenges Ikumi’s rule as outside forces close in.

title: In Order to Stay as Myself
overview: Personal identity and choices come to the forefront.

title: Tomorrow
overview: With the Final battle and resolution, survival comes at a cost. The remaining crew moves toward an uncertain future.
